question: How does an end user install a third-party plugin into the MiraboxSpace StreamDock host application on Windows? Specifically: (a) packaging format (file extension, archive structure, required manifest at root); (b) install target directory or install method (drag-and-drop onto the host, copy into a host plugins directory, install via in-host marketplace, sideload via developer mode); (c) signing or notarization requirements, if any; (d) user-facing steps to install and to activate the plugin in Touchbar Mode.
constraints: Cite canonical MiraboxSpace developer / user documentation. If documentation is unreachable, set external_source_unreachable: true.

FC.1 (plugin appears in host's plugin list after install) and FC.2 (user can activate in Touchbar Mode) depend on this answer. A correctly-coded plugin in the wrong package format is indistinguishable to the user from a broken plugin.
Do not assume the Elgato Stream Deck plugin package format. MiraboxSpace may or may not use a similar format; that is a finding to verify, not a default to assume.
